UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL IS DENIED. "WHEN A DEMURRER TO ANY PLEADING IS SUSTAINED OR OVERRULED, AND TIME TO AMEND OR ANSWER IS GIVEN, THE TIME SO GIVEN RUNS FROM THE SERVICE OF NOTICE OF THE DECISION OR ORDER." CCP 472B. DEFENDANT, PREVAILING PARTY ON DEMURRER, FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312, I.E. NO PROPOSED ORDER WAS PROVIDED FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM TO PLAINTIFF, NO PROPOSED ORDER WAS PROVIDED TO THE COURT FOR EXECUTION, THEREFORE, NO NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER WAS GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF AND THE TIME TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT HAS NOT STARTED RUNNING. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Sherene Randles Third Amended Complaint For Delay Of Prosecution

is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on January 26, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.,'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with final 20-day leave to amend to allege a viable cause of action addressing all issues raised by demurrer. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment Of Dismissal is DENIED. "When a demurrer to any pleading is sustained or overruled, and time to amend or answer is given, the time so given runs from the service of notice of the decision or order." CCP 472b. Defendant, prevailing party on Demurrer, failed to comply with CRC 3.1312, i.e. no proposed order was provided for approval as to form to Plaintiff, no proposed order was provided to the Court for execution, therefore, no notice of entry of order was given to Plaintiff and the time to file an amended complaint has not started running. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege all elements of each cause of action in light of judicially noticeable documents. Defendants' request for judicial notice is GRANTED. The Court does not make a ruling on preemption argument as it is premature without a valid cause of action. Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not Reported (D501).
